CONTENT.Career: In 2019, Providence joined the youth academy of Italian Serie A side Roma. In 2021, he was sent on loan to Club Brugge in Belgium. Before the second half of 2021–22, he was sent on loan to Portuguese club Estoril.In 2022, Providence was sent on loan to TSV Hartberg in Austria. On 2 October 2022, he debuted for TSV Hartberg during a 3–2 loss to Austria Klagenfurt.On 29 August 2024, Providence signed a three-year contract with Almere City in the Netherlands.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Providence is of Haitian descent. He is a youth international for France, having played for the France U19s.
CONTENT.External links: Ruben Providence at SoccerwayRuben Providence at the French Football Federation (in French)

SUMMARY: Ruben Fritzner Providence (born 7 July 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for Dutch Eredivisie club Almere City.
